title: Team & Enterprise Collaboration
description: Add features that enable teams to standardize developer environments across organizations, including shared configuration templates, configuration inheritance with recursive extending, and version lock files for reproducibility
acceptance_criteria: extends field accepts URL or local path
Multiple inheritance with array syntax works
Diamond dependencies handled correctly (load once, apply once)
Deep merge of tool sections (child overrides parent)
Hook merging appends (both parent and child run, parent first)
Circular dependency detection with clear error message
jarvy config show --resolved displays merged config
jarvy config show --extends-chain shows inheritance tree
Cache for remote configs with configurable TTL
Graceful fallback when remote unavailable (use stale cache)
jarvy team add registers config source
jarvy team list shows registered sources
jarvy team browse discovers available configs via index.toml
jarvy lock generates jarvy.lock from current environment
jarvy setup --locked uses lock file versions
jarvy lock status shows drift between lock and installed

tasks.title: Create team module structure
tasks.description: Set up the module structure for team collaboration features

tasks.title: Add extends field to Config
tasks.description: Extend the Config struct to support the extends field
subtasks: Add extends field to Config struct
Support both string and array syntax via serde

tasks.title: Implement ConfigCache
tasks.description: Create caching layer for remote configs
subtasks: Create ConfigCache struct with cache_dir and ttl
Implement set() with TOML validation before caching
Use SHA256 hash of URL as cache key

tasks.title: Implement InheritanceResolver
tasks.description: Core recursive config resolution with depth-first traversal
subtasks: Add in_progress HashSet for cycle detection
Add resolved_cache HashMap for diamond dependency handling
Implement resolve() with depth-first, left-to-right traversal
Create ResolutionTrace struct for inheritance chain tracking

tasks.title: Implement config merging
tasks.description: Deep merge logic for all config sections
subtasks: Implement merge_tools() - deep merge, overlay wins
Implement merge_env() - deep merge for vars and secrets

tasks.title: Implement error handling
tasks.description: Comprehensive error types and messages for inheritance

tasks.title: Implement remote config loading
tasks.description: Fetch configs from URLs with caching
subtasks: Transform GitHub URLs to raw content URLs
Transform Gist URLs to raw format

tasks.title: Integrate inheritance into setup flow
tasks.description: Use InheritanceResolver during jarvy setup
subtasks: Pass resolved config to setup flow

tasks.title: Implement jarvy config show --resolved
tasks.description: Display fully merged configuration
subtasks: Show source annotation for each value

tasks.title: Implement jarvy config show --extends-chain
tasks.description: Display inheritance tree visualization

tasks.title: Implement jarvy config validate --check-extends
tasks.description: Validate extends chain without running setup
subtasks: Report any errors (cycles, missing, invalid TOML)

tasks.title: Implement jarvy config refresh
tasks.description: Force refresh cached parent configs
subtasks: Add --recursive flag to refresh all in chain

tasks.title: Create team config registry module
tasks.description: Module for managing team config sources
subtasks: Define Source struct: name, url, last_sync
Parse index.toml format for config discovery

tasks.title: Implement jarvy team commands
tasks.description: CLI commands for team config management
subtasks: Add to Commands enum in main.rs

tasks.title: Implement jarvy init --from
tasks.description: Initialize project from team config
subtasks: Generate jarvy.toml with extends pointing to source

tasks.title: Create lock module structure
tasks.description: Set up module for version lock files

tasks.title: Implement lock file generation
tasks.description: Generate jarvy.lock from current environment
subtasks: Get installed version for each tool in config
Determine install source (brew, apt, nvm, etc.)

tasks.title: Implement lock verification
tasks.description: Verify installed tools match lock file
subtasks: Compare installed versions to locked versions
Detect: matches, mismatch, missing, newer available

tasks.title: Implement jarvy lock commands
tasks.description: CLI commands for lock file management
subtasks: Add to Commands enum in main.rs

tasks.title: Implement --locked flag for setup
tasks.description: Use lock file versions during setup
subtasks: Use locked versions instead of config versions
Error if lock file missing with --locked
Warn on version mismatch between config and lock

tasks.title: Write unit tests for inheritance
tasks.description: Comprehensive tests for inheritance resolution

tasks.title: Write unit tests for lock
tasks.description: Tests for lock file generation and verification
subtasks: Test lock generation with mock tools

tasks.title: Write integration tests
tasks.description: End-to-end tests for team features
subtasks: Test jarvy setup with extends (local file)

tasks.title: Add sha2 dependency
tasks.description: Add sha2 crate for checksum computation

tasks.title: Update documentation
tasks.description: Document team collaboration features
subtasks: Document merge rules for each section

implementation_notes.resolution_order: Depth-first, left-to-right traversal with last-write-wins merging
implementation_notes.diamond_handling: Use resolved_cache HashMap to load configs only once
implementation_notes.cycle_detection: Use in_progress HashSet for configs currently being resolved
implementation_notes.hook_order: Ancestor hooks run first, then descendant hooks (parent before child)
implementation_notes.offline_mode: Use stale cache with warning if network unavailable

risks.description: Inheritance conflicts - deep merge can have unexpected results
risks.mitigation: Clear precedence rules, --resolved flag to inspect merged config

risks.description: Offline remote configs - network issues block setup
risks.mitigation: Aggressive caching, offline fallback to stale cache

risks.description: Lock file drift - easy to forget to update lock
risks.mitigation: CI integration guidance, warnings on mismatch

risks.description: Cache invalidation - stale configs cause issues
risks.mitigation: Configurable TTL, manual sync command, refresh --recursive

risks.description: Circular dependencies - could cause infinite loops
risks.mitigation: in_progress set detection, clear error messages with cycle path
